```python
def main():
    import sys
    s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    rev_s = s[::-1]
    combined = s + '#' + rev_s
    lps = [0] * len(combined)
    
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = lps[i-1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = lps[j-1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    pal_len = lps[-1]
    result = s[:len(s) - pal_len][::-1] + s
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
